mouth_sync.workflow_summary: Import clean voiceover and timing markers, bind mouth shapes to puppet visemes, then pass the rendered character shot into After Effects for editorial polish.

blink_and_gesture_systems.workflow_summary: Drive blink, head turn, body motion, and gesture swaps with puppet behaviors, then add timing accents and camera polish in After Effects.

puppet_setup.workflow_summary: Build puppet groups from exported character refs, layer manifests, and rig sockets, preserving identity packages and anchor points.

prop_interaction.workflow_summary: Attach exported props to socket-driven hands where possible, then use keyed overrides in After Effects when contact timing needs stronger control.

shot_compositing.workflow_summary: Composite puppet renders, document inserts, overlays, and subtitle-safe framing in After Effects before final assembly.

camera_control.workflow_summary: Translate exported camera recipes and composition guides into keyframed pushes, parallax, and reframing moves in After Effects.

mouth_sync.workflow_summary: Use exported mouth-shape expectations and timing markers to drive phoneme swaps in Harmony, then composite and polish in After Effects.

blink_and_gesture_systems.workflow_summary: Build reusable eye, brow, arm, and pose swaps in Harmony, then add editorial timing polish after render.

puppet_setup.workflow_summary: Convert exported character refs, layer manifests, and sockets into Harmony peg-based puppets with reusable pose controls.

prop_interaction.workflow_summary: Use peg and deform controls for hand-to-prop contact, then accent reveal timing and impact beats in After Effects.

shot_compositing.workflow_summary: Render character shots from Harmony and merge them with inserts, overlays, and camera polish in After Effects.

camera_control.workflow_summary: Apply exported camera recipes either in Harmony's camera system or as post camera refinement in After Effects.

mouth_sync.workflow_summary: Import clean audio and timing markers into Animate, map mouth symbols, then composite and refine in After Effects.

blink_and_gesture_systems.workflow_summary: Use symbol swaps and keyframed gesture loops in Animate, then add editorial timing and camera treatment in After Effects.

puppet_setup.workflow_summary: Translate exported layers and identity refs into symbol-driven characters with controllable mouth, eye, arm, and prop states.

prop_interaction.workflow_summary: Animate prop contacts with symbol swaps and keyed transforms, then use After Effects for proof emphasis and compositing.

shot_compositing.workflow_summary: Use After Effects for inserts, overlays, subtitle-safe framing, and final camera polish around Animate renders.

camera_control.workflow_summary: Treat exported camera recipes as After Effects camera moves while keeping Animate focused on character motion.
